SURE Group

Three Companies. One Trusted Standard.

Each SURE Group company brings focused capabilities while sharing one commitment to quality, safety, and accountable delivery.

Three Companies. One Trusted Standard.
Commercial HVAC • Mechanical Construction • Environmental Control
SURE Mechanical
Certified minority-owned mechanical contractor

SURE Mechanical

Commercial HVAC and mechanical contractor specializing in mechanical design, fabrication, installation, engineering, sheet metal ductwork, hydronic piping, welding, BIM coordination, LEED/sustainable projects, and large-scale public and institutional work.

Strengths

HVAC constructionFabricationSheet metal ductworkHydronic pipingWeldingBIMLEED/sustainable projectsPublic/institutional work
Cincinnati Air Conditioning Company
Legacy design-build HVAC since 1938

Cincinnati Air Conditioning Company

A design-build commercial and industrial HVAC company founded in 1938 with deep experience in engineered HVAC systems, process piping, building automation, commercial refrigeration, service, preventative maintenance, and custom mechanical systems.

Strengths

Design-build HVACProcess pipingBuilding automationCommercial refrigerationEquipment servicePreventative maintenance24/7 support
Thermolinear
Custom environmental control systems

Thermolinear

A custom environmental control systems manufacturer specializing in modular environmental rooms, dry rooms, clean rooms, growth chambers, environmental chambers, custom heating/cooling equipment, installation, testing, and commissioning.

Strengths

Clean roomsDry roomsGrowth chambersModular environmental roomsEnvironmental chambersTesting and commissioning
SGSURE GroupMechanical Excellence

SURE Group unites SURE Mechanical, Cincinnati Air Conditioning Company, and Thermolinear to deliver enterprise HVAC construction, mechanical fabrication, service, and environmental control solutions.
